message:
feat(Python): Implement 2 GC CPython modules in Zig

- gc_free_threading.zig: Free-threaded GC with biased reference counting
  - GCState with 3 generations, thread-safe operations
  - Biased refcount (local + shared) for lock-free paths
  - Mark-alive and sweep collection phases

- gc_gil.zig: Standard GIL-based GC with generational collection
  - GCRuntimeState with 3 generations + permanent
  - Doubly-linked object lists with iterators
  - Cycle detection via mark-sweep algorithm
